description_long: This is a sleek, modern blue convertible sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and aggressive styling. The car features a bold front fascia with angular headlights, a vented hood, and a prominent gold front splitter. The sides display sculpted lines, large black wheels, and gold side skirts, while the open-top design reveals a two-seat black interior with yellow accents. At the rear, the car has a louvered engine cover, subtle taillights, and a gold rear diffuser, emphasizing its performance-oriented character. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle, likely inspired by Italian supercars, with a focus on speed and luxury. The materials appear to be a combination of painted metal, glass, rubber, and synthetic upholstery.
description: A blue and gold convertible sports car with aggressive styling, open top, and black/yellow-accented interior. Features include sculpted sides, large wheels, and a louvered rear engine cover.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular headlights, vented hood, and gold front splitter, emphasizing the car's aggressive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted body lines, open cabin, large black wheels, and gold side skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the louvered engine cover, subtle taillights, and gold rear diffuser.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open top, interior details, and gold side skirt.
